_comment: Test vectors for the DAG entity format. Hash values are computed by the reference implementation (Go encoding/json + crypto/sha256). Run 'go test ./doc/spec/...' to verify.

id_derivation.description: SHA-256 of an empty byte sequence (sanity check)
Operation pack with a single CreateOperation. Input is the exact bytes produced by Go's json.Marshal of the operationPack struct.
id_derivation.note: The expected_id below is the SHA-256 of the compact JSON encoding of input (no spaces). Fill in by running the reference implementation.

tree_entries.description: Git tree for the first commit of a bug with edit-clock=1 and create-clock=1, format version 4
notes: The empty blob hash e69de29bb2d1d6434b8b29ae775ad8c2e48c5391 is used for all metadata entries.
Entry names are sorted lexicographically by git.
No 'extra/' subtree because this operation has no file attachments.

tree_entries.description: Git tree for a later (non-root) commit with edit-clock=2, format version 4
notes: No 'extra/' subtree because this operation has no file attachments.

tree_entries.description: Git tree for a merge commit (empty ops, two parents)
notes: Merge commits have two parents in git but their ops array is empty.
The edit clock is advanced past both parents.

operation_pack_examples.description: Minimal valid operation pack for a new bug
